final_prompt.prompt:
Create a product shot showcasing tactical military gear — firearms, ballistic vests, and night-vision devices arranged in a structured flat-lay display.

Style/medium: photorealistic flat-lay product photography, editorial military catalog aesthetic
Composition: top-down overhead view, symmetrical grid arrangement, all items neatly aligned with even spacing, wide-angle lens
Subject: assorted tactical firearms, ballistic vests, and night-vision goggles laid out in an organized, methodical display
Scene/backdrop: deep charcoal or near-black matte surface, minimal background detail to keep focus on equipment
Lighting/mood: cold, directional hard light from a single high side angle, sharp shadows, austere and authoritative atmosphere
Color palette: deep blacks and dark grays as base, muted olive drab and flat dark earth tones on gear, cool steel highlights on metal surfaces
Materials/textures: matte polymer surfaces, woven ballistic nylon weave, brushed metal barrel and rail textures, rubber eyepiece on optics
Avoid: warm or golden lighting, cluttered or chaotic arrangement, cartoonish rendering, motion blur, watermark
